stars.name: RNAV DOTOL 2P

constraints: MANBA to PIMIK at 220 kt IAS, bank angle 25°
YUMIN at or above 4 000 ft / 195 kt
YUMIN IAF, bank angle 25° segment ends before YUMIN
holding: MANBA hold: left turns, 1.5 min, +9 000 / -13 000, max 250 kt
YUMIN hold: left turns, 1.0 min, +4 000 / -7 000, max 230 kt

approaches.name: ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 07
approaches.missed_approach: Climb to 8 000 ft on track of 066° to PC404, then RIGHT turn on track of 102° to PETAA and hold.
constraints: LOC only recommended profile from DME ICJU
approaches.source_section: ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 07

approaches.name: ILS Y or LOC Y RWY 07
approaches.missed_approach: Climb straight ahead until YDM D4 then RIGHT turn to intercept R 096 YDM to PETAA and hold at 8 000 ft.
constraints: AKBIN is 12 DME ARC / 12.00 NM YDM
approaches.source_section: ILS Y or LOC Y RWY 07

approaches.name: RNP Z RWY 07
approaches.missed_approach: Climb to 8 000 ft on track of 066° to PC404, then RIGHT turn on track of 102° to PETAA.
constraints: RNP 0.5 required on initial and intermediate, RNP 0.11 final, RNP 0.15 missed approach

approaches.name: RNP Y RWY 07
approaches.missed_approach: Climb to 8 000 ft on track of 066° to PC404, then RIGHT turn on track of 102° to PETAA and hold at 8 000 ft.
constraints: YUMIN hold available +4 000 / -7 000, left turns, max 230 kt

approaches.name: VOR RWY 07
approaches.missed_approach: Climb on R 065 YDM until 4 DME, then RIGHT turn to intercept R 096 YDM to PETAA and hold at 8 000 ft.
constraints: AKBIN is 12 DME ARC / 12.00 NM YDM

approaches.name: ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 25
approaches.missed_approach: Climb to 6 000 ft on track of 246° to PC403, then RIGHT turn on track of 263° to LOTKA and hold.
approaches.source_section: ILS Z or LOC Z RWY 25

approaches.name: ILS Y or LOC Y RWY 25
approaches.missed_approach: Climb to 6 000 ft then RIGHT turn HDG 263° to LOTKA and hold at 6 000 ft.
constraints: OMKEL is 16 DME ARC / 16.00 NM YDM
PETAA is 22 DME ARC / 22.00 NM YDM
Missed approach turn limited to maximum 210 kt IAS
approaches.source_section: ILS Y or LOC Y RWY 25

approaches.name: RNP Z RWY 25
approaches.missed_approach: Climb to 6 000 ft on track of 246° to PC403, then RIGHT turn on track of 263° to LOTKA.
constraints: RNP 0.5 required on initial and intermediate, RNP 0.11 final, RNP 0.15 missed approach

approaches.name: RNP Y RWY 25
approaches.missed_approach: Climb to 6 000 ft on track of 246° to PC403, then RIGHT turn on track of 263° to LOTKA.
constraints: LOTKA hold +6 000 / -11 000, left turns, max 210 kt

approaches.name: VOR RWY 25
approaches.missed_approach: Climb on R 247 YDM until 15 DME, then RIGHT turn HDG 261° to LOTKA and hold at 6 000 ft.
constraints: OMKEL 16 DME arc / PETAA 22 DME arc

visual_approach_rules.name: AIP/Chart general visual approach gate
conditions: Vectors may be initiated by ATC or approved upon pilot request on traffic permitting basis

visual_approach_rules.name: RWY 07 visual final alignment restriction
conditions: When conducting visual approach RWY 07, all arriving aircraft shall align the final approach course outside YDM 6 DME

visual_approach_rules.name: local procedure reference local ARR visual approach condition
conditions: 조종사 요청 또는 관제사 제안에 대한 조종사 수용
조종사가 공항 또는 활주로를 식별하였다고 보고
선행기가 SUPER인 경우 visual approach 불가
visual_approach_rules.notes: Chart/manual 조건과 수치가 달라 local AR operating condition으로 별도 보존한다.

notes: 절차명은 최신 차트 표기를 우선 사용했다. local procedure reference의 RWY25 STAR 표기와 차트 표기 간 차이는 차트 우선으로 처리했다.
이번 패스에서 UPGOS 1P chain, RWY 07/25 pseudo-fix, missed-approach anchor를 추가했다.
2026-05-05: Current source is KOCA eAIP Package 2026-04-30, AIP AMDT 5/26, currently effective 30 APR 2026.
2026-05-05: PC726 is retained as current RNAV DOTOL 2P waypoint and is coordinate-verified from RKPC AD CHART 2-18.
2026-05-05: RWY31 RNAV KAMIT 2N and AKPON 1N are modeled as part of simulator RWY25+31 mode; common TMA/MVA/map layers remain runway-independent.
Normal route waypoints use coding-table Fly-over '-' as fly_by. HM holding rows with Fly-over 'Y' are recorded separately and are not active route legs yet.
